description_long: This is a sleek, metallic sports car with a distinctive stainless steel body and angular lines, reminiscent of the DeLorean DMC-12. The car features gull-wing doors, black-tinted windows, and a low, aerodynamic profile. Along the sides and rear, there are visible futuristic modifications, including exposed wiring, tubes, and a prominent rear-mounted device with circular and rectangular components, suggesting advanced technology. The wheels are black with a multi-spoke design, and the car's trim includes silver and blue accents. The front is characterized by a wide, flat hood and narrow headlights, while the rear displays a complex assembly of mechanical parts and red taillights. The overall appearance is both retro and high-tech, making it stand out in any urban environment.
description: A stainless steel sports car with gull-wing doors, black windows, and futuristic rear modifications, featuring exposed wiring and a complex rear device. The car has a low, angular profile and black multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat hood, narrow headlights, and black-tinted windshield, with blue and silver accents visible on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gull-wing door outline, exposed wiring along the side, and the detailed rear device, as well as the black multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the intricate rear-mounted device, red taillights, and mechanical components, with the car's angular lines and silver trim visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the gull-wing door, exposed wiring, and the rear device, with clear visibility of the wheel design.
